meta.description: Mobility includes any theme, event, mention, or discussion related to urban mobility, transportation, and transit. It considers traffic, road conditions, public transit, cycling, pedestrian issues, transportation planning, and commuting. An article talks about mobility whenever it addresses or touches any related subject — whether reporting a road closure, discussing public transit quality, covering a traffic incident, or mentioning transportation infrastructure in passing. An article may match both this theme and a specific event schema (e.g. closures_interruptions_event) — both are extracted separately.

example.description: El gobierno estatal presento el plan de expansion del sistema de transporte publico que incluye nuevas rutas y unidades.
example.context: El plan responde a demandas ciudadanas de mejor conectividad en zonas perifericas de la ciudad.
policy_or_plans: Plan de Expansion del Transporte Publico 2025-2027

theme_type.description: Type of mobility theme. Choose the single most specific category that matches.

description.description: Summary of how the article touches or discusses mobility — whether reporting a traffic incident, covering transit changes, discussing transportation policy, or mentioning road conditions.

tags.description: Keywords and topics relevant to this mobility theme.

context.description: Broader context: urban growth, policy background, historical transit issues.

relevance.description: Relevance of this theme within the article: 1 = main topic, 2 = secondary, 3 = implicit.

sentiment.description: General sentiment or tone of the discourse about mobility.

location.description: Geographic area the mobility theme pertains to. Fill only if the discussion is explicitly about a specific area.

time_scope.description: The time period the article's mobility discussion covers (e.g. '2025-2027', 'este semestre'). Captures the temporal scope of the discourse.

infrastructure_mentioned.description: Roads, bridges, transit systems, or other infrastructure mentioned. Each item separately.

congestion_or_conditions.description: Traffic conditions, congestion patterns, or road state described.

policy_or_plans.description: Transportation policies, urban mobility plans, or government initiatives mentioned. Each plan or policy separately.
